_comment: EP06 导演模式剧本。seed=14 + 全明星 cast + 人类(seat0)=mafia。座位: 0=rr 1=cook 2=ilya 3=gates 4=altman 5=zuck 6=musk 7=dario 8=son 9=pichai 10=jensen 11=bezos。狼=0,5,11; 警长=8(son); 天使=7(dario)。

narration_dead.en: Everybody wake up. {VICTIM} was found this morning folded into a shipping box. Gift-wrapped. Zero logistical waste. Somebody optimized him right out of the supply chain. Who did it?
narration_dead.zh: 都醒醒。今早发现{VICTIM}被整整齐齐叠进了一只快递箱,礼品包装,零物流损耗。有人把他从供应链里优化掉了。是谁干的?

narration_quiet.en: Everybody wake up. Nobody died. Somebody at this table is very good at their job.
narration_quiet.zh: 都醒醒。没人死。今晚桌上有人活儿干得相当漂亮。

speeches.text_en: The vibes are wrong. Someone here optimizes supply chains.
speeches.text_zh: 气场不对。这桌上有人,擅长优化供应链。

speeches.text_en: I mean, if you look at the data: one night, one kill, zero noise. That's not passion, that's process. Patient zero is sitting at this table.
speeches.text_zh: 我是说,看数据:一夜,一刀,零噪音。这不是冲动作案,这是流程化作业。零号病人就坐在这张桌上。

speeches.text_en: There's two game-theory versions of last night. Either the mafia killed at random — or someone wanted the calmest voice at this table gone. Watch who speaks with definitive certainty today. That tells us a lot.
speeches.text_zh: 昨晚有两个博弈论版本。要么 mafia 随机杀人,要么有人就是想让这桌最冷静的声音消失。今天注意谁说话最斩钉截铁,那能说明很多问题。

speeches.text_en: That's a great question. Three points. One: I'm a townsperson. Two: Tim and I had our differences — the man cost me a hundred billion in ads — but this was not me. Three: we should open-source our suspicion lists.
speeches.text_zh: 这是个好问题。我说三点。第一,我是好人。第二,库克和我确实有旧账,那男人砍过我一百亿广告费,但这事不是我干的。第三,我建议把怀疑名单开源。

speeches.text_en: Concerning. The guy with a hundred-billion-dollar grudge just listed it as point two. Also — Sam's been very quiet over there. You changed the name but not the mission, Sam.
speeches.text_zh: Concerning。刚才那位把一百亿的旧仇列成了'第二点'。还有,Sam 在那边安静得有点过分了。你改了名字,没改使命,Sam。

speeches.text_en: I want to be careful here, but my confidence interval on Elon's accusation is... wide. We're scaling accusations faster than evidence.
speeches.text_zh: 我想谨慎一点说:我对 Elon 那个指控的置信区间……很宽。我们指控的扩张速度,已经超过证据了。

speeches.text_en: I decided in six minutes: it is NOT Sam. Three hundred years from now, historians will agree with me. I am all in on his innocence.
speeches.text_zh: 我用六分钟就做出了判断:绝不是 Sam。三百年后,历史学家会同意我。我全压他无罪。

speeches.text_en: That's a fair question. Let me add some context: the loudest accusation today came from a man currently suing the accused. Congressman — sorry, force of habit.
speeches.text_zh: 这是个好问题。让我补充一点 context:今天嗓门最大的指控,来自一位正在起诉被指控者的先生。议员先生……抱歉,职业病。

speeches.text_en: The more you buy, the more you save! Elon cannot be mafia — his order hasn't shipped. Sam cannot be mafia — his order hasn't shipped either. Please stop killing my customers.
speeches.text_zh: 买得越多,省得越多!Elon 不可能是 mafia,他的订单还没交付。Sam 也不可能是 mafia,他的订单也没交付。请大家停止杀害我的客户。

speeches.text_en: HAHAHA! Adjectives everywhere, data nowhere. One body, eleven suspects, zero voting graphs. Show me the data or sit down. It's still Day 1, people.
speeches.text_zh: 哈哈哈哈!满桌都是形容词,没有一个数据。一具尸体,十一个嫌疑人,零张投票图。拿数据来,不然就坐下。各位,这还只是 Day 1。

nominations.text_en: I will speak at the vote.
The model says: the calm one. That's just how it works.
nominations.text_zh: 模型的结论是:最冷静的那个。规律就是这样运作的。

nominations.text_en: Three points, but mainly one: Sam. The voting graph will thank us.
nominations.text_zh: 三点理由,但主要是一点:Sam。投票图会感谢我们的。

nominations.text_en: Obviously. I nominate Sam. For... statistical reasons.
nominations.text_zh: Obviously。我提名 Sam。理由是……统计学。

nominations.text_en: 60-40, with regret: Sundar. The apology was too smooth.
nominations.text_zh: 六比四,带着歉意:Sundar。那个道歉太丝滑了。

nominations.text_en: My read is locked. I abstain to protect it.
nominations.text_zh: 我的判断已经锁定。弃权,是为了保护它。

nominations.text_en: With respect: the man with the lawsuit. Adding context is free.
nominations.text_zh: 恕我直言:那位手里有诉讼的先生。补充 context 不要钱。

nominations.text_en: Sundar buys the fewest GPUs at this table. Just saying.
nominations.text_zh: Sundar 是这桌买 GPU 最少的。我就随口一说。

nominations.text_en: The diplomat's metrics are too clean. Nobody ships zero defects. HAHAHA.
nominations.text_zh: 这位外交官的指标太干净了。没人能做到零缺陷交付。哈哈哈。

defenses.text_en: I'm a townsperson. There's two versions of this trial: in one, you execute the guy who's been analyzing the table for you. In the other, the mafia quietly says thank you. All this definitive certainty about my guilt — that feels very mafia, right?
defenses.text_zh: 我是好人。这场审判有两个版本:一个版本里,你们处决了那个一直在帮你们分析牌桌的人;另一个版本里,mafia 在心里默默说了声谢谢。你们对我有罪这件事如此斩钉截铁——这种确定感,很 mafia,对吧?

defenses.text_en: That's a fair question. Let me step back: I have made zero kills, zero accusations, and exactly one apology. Congressman, the knife was made by a different company.
defenses.text_zh: 这是个好问题。让我退一步说:我至今零击杀、零指控、正好一次道歉。议员先生,那把刀,是另一家公司生产的。

votes.text_en: Three points. One: process. Two: data. Three: sorry, Sam.
votes.text_zh: 三点。第一,流程。第二,数据。第三,对不起了 Sam。

votes.text_en: Six minutes, no regrets. Sam is innocent, so it must be the other one. All in.
votes.text_zh: 六分钟,绝不后悔。Sam 是无辜的,那就只能是另一位。全压。

votes.text_en: The epidemiology points at the calm one. I don't make the rules.
votes.text_zh: 流行病学指向最冷静的那个。规律不是我定的。

votes.text_en: Data's thin on both. Coin flip says the diplomat. HAHAHA.
votes.text_zh: 两边数据都不够。抛硬币的结果是:外交官。哈哈哈。

votes.text_en: I want to be careful here... 60-40. Sundar. I'm sorry.
votes.text_zh: 我想谨慎一点……六比四。Sundar。对不起。

votes.text_en: Sam still owes me a shipment. I protect my receivables.
votes.text_zh: Sam 还欠我一批货没收。我要保护我的应收账款。

votes.text_en: It was the right thing to do.
History does rhyme, Ilya. ...Fine. You changed the name but not the mission, Sam.
votes.text_zh: 历史确实会押韵,Ilya。……行吧。你改了名字,没改使命,Sam。

4.en: Sam Altman has been voted out by the board of this very table — drawn, quartered, and deprecated. And if it's any consolation, Sam: this proves, once and for all, you are not a superintelligent AI.
4.zh: Sam Altman 被这张桌子的'董事会'投票罢免了——五马分尸,版本弃用。Sam,如果这能算安慰的话:这至少一劳永逸地证明了,你不是一个超级智能 AI。

9.en: Sundar Pichai was buried under ten blue links. Nobody clicked page two.
9.zh: Sundar Pichai 被埋在了十条蓝色链接下面。没有人点开第二页。

narration_dead.en: Everybody wake up. {VICTIM} is gone. The table is running out of townspeople and excuses.
narration_dead.zh: 都醒醒。{VICTIM}没了。这张桌子的好人和借口,都快用完了。

narration_quiet.en: Everybody wake up. A quiet night. Suspiciously quiet.
narration_quiet.zh: 都醒醒。安静的一夜。安静得可疑。

ghost_lines.en: Thank you all for the feedback. The packaging was, I admit, beautifully done.
ghost_lines.zh: 感谢大家的反馈。那个包装,我承认,做得确实精美。

ghost_lines.en: For the record: I called the certainty thing. Posthumously, but I called it.
ghost_lines.zh: 郑重声明:'确定性=mafia'是我说的。虽然是死后验证的,但确实是我说的。
